# Ground Roll

**Summary**: Low-frequency, high-amplitude surface waves that travel horizontally.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-putra|Putra, 2018]] addressed the attenuation of ground roll using seismic arrays.

## Scientific Context

- [[2018-putra|Putra, 2018]] Ground roll is a primary noise source that masks deeper seismic reflections.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2018-putra|Putra, 2018]] Identified as high-amplitude, low-frequency signals.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The purpose of using seismic receiver arrays is to enhance the S/N by attenuating... ground roll. ([[2018-putra|Putra, 2018, p. 82]])
